summary: Wait for every rx-demo workload to become available.
command: kubectl -n rx-demo rollout status deploy/api-gateway --timeout=180s && kubectl -n rx-demo rollout status deploy/legacy-sync-worker --timeout=180s && kubectl -n rx-demo rollout status deploy/read-model-projection --timeout=180s && kubectl -n rx-demo rollout status deploy/rx-ui --timeout=180s && kubectl -n rx-demo get pods -o wide
